title: Spaza shop registration deadline extended
description: GEORGE NEWS - The deadline for registering...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The deadline for registering Spaza Shops, House Shops, and other Food Premises has been extended to 28 February 2025.


> George Municipality urges all operators within the municipal area to complete their registration before the new deadline.


The registration drive is part of measures to address the recurring foodborne illnesses that have claimed the lives of at least 22 people, mostly children, across the country.

For detailed information on how to apply for a business licence and the specific requirements for spaza shops, please click here. Who has to apply for a business licence:

- Sale or supply of meals or perishable foodstuffs
- Health Establishments
- Entertainment
- Hawking in meals or perishable foodstuffs

An application form must be completed, which can be obtained at the George Municipality, Department for Environmental Services situated at 82 Meade Street, George and at the Municipal Offices in Uniondale.

Previous articles:

- Spaza shop owners can still register today
- Spaza shop D-day looming, only 150 registered
- Spazas get 21 days to re-register or close their doors
- Scuzzy spaza closed in blitz
- Ins and outs about food labelling
- Nine children hospitalised after sharing packets of chips

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
